application_status: draft local application; not yet production signed

privacy_boundary.interpretation: workflow demonstration only; not a reference LD panel

source.pair_rule: adjacent variant pairs in selected coordinate order

rejected_sources.reason: controlled-access human genomic data is out of scope
single-sample truth sets are not suitable for cohort LD

source.sample_selection_rule: take the first five samples encountered for each super-population in order EUR, EAS, AMR, AFR, SAS
source.variant_selection_rule: first complete-call, biallelic, polymorphic SNPs in the chr22 window with IGSR global AF between 0.05 and 0.95
source.why_selected: IGSR/1000 Genomes Phase 3 is an official public multi-sample human genotype VCF suitable for a small LD workflow demo.

blindmachine_org.local_verification_command: python3 -m pytest applications/genotype_pair_ld/tests && bash docs/paper/experiments/e8_public_ld_window.sh && python3 -m json.tool docs/paper/experiments/public_ld_window_2026_07_09/results/provenance.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/paper/experiments/public_ld_window_2026_07_09/results/verification.json >/dev/null
blindmachine_org.reason: Hosted verification certificate generation requires a published application bundle/result and server credentials. This E8 run is a local aggregate-only public-data experiment.

hosted_computation_certificate.reason: This optional public-real-DNA experiment was run locally and has not been submitted to the hosted blindmachine.org computation service, so no /verify/:certificate_hash page exists yet.

verification.local_reproduction_command: python3 -m pytest applications/genotype_pair_ld/tests && bash docs/paper/experiments/e8_public_ld_window.sh && python3 -m json.tool docs/paper/experiments/public_ld_window_2026_07_09/results/provenance.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/paper/experiments/public_ld_window_2026_07_09/results/verification.json >/dev/null
